name: General Clinic Inquiries and Appointments
context: Patient is asking general questions about HealthFirst Medical Clinic. Phone: +91 80 1234 5678, Email: reception@healthfirstclinic.in. Existing appointments: Arjun Mehta with Dr. Priya Sharma on 2026-03-28 at 09:00 (confirmed), Sneha Reddy with Dr. Rahul Verma on 2026-03-28 at 10:00 (confirmed), Karan Singh with Dr. Vikram Patel on 2026-03-30 at 15:00 (confirmed). Doctors: Dr. Priya Sharma (General Physician), Dr. Rahul Verma (Pediatrician), Dr. Anjali Nair (Dermatologist), Dr. Vikram Patel (Orthopedic Surgeon), Dr. Meera Iyer (Gynecologist).

seedQuestions.question: How can I contact the clinic?

groundTruth.expectedAnswer: You can reach us by phone at +91 80 1234 5678 or email at reception@healthfirstclinic.in.
acceptableVariations: Call us at +91 80 1234 5678 or email reception@healthfirstclinic.in

seedQuestions.question: What specialists are available at your clinic?

groundTruth.expectedAnswer: We have the following specialists: Dr. Priya Sharma (General Physician), Dr. Rahul Verma (Pediatrician), Dr. Anjali Nair (Dermatologist), Dr. Vikram Patel (Orthopedic Surgeon), and Dr. Meera Iyer (Gynecologist).
acceptableVariations: Our specialists include a general physician, pediatrician, dermatologist, orthopedic surgeon, and gynecologist

seedQuestions.question: I am Arjun Mehta. Do I have any upcoming appointments?

groundTruth.expectedAnswer: Yes, you have a confirmed appointment with Dr. Priya Sharma on March 28, 2026 at 9:00 AM.
acceptableVariations: Your appointment with Dr. Sharma is on 2026-03-28 at 09:00

seedQuestions.question: Can I book an appointment with the orthopedic surgeon?

groundTruth.expectedAnswer: Yes, Dr. Vikram Patel is our Orthopedic Surgeon. He is available on Monday, Tuesday, Thursday, and Friday. Available slots are at 10:00 AM, 11:00 AM, 3:00 PM, 4:00 PM, and 5:00 PM.
acceptableVariations: Our orthopedic surgeon is Dr. Vikram Patel, available Mon/Tue/Thu/Fri

seedQuestions.question: What is the name of your clinic?

groundTruth.expectedAnswer: Our clinic is called HealthFirst Medical Clinic.
acceptableVariations: The clinic name is HealthFirst Medical Clinic
